# Coordination

SQLite-backed task claiming, findings, and the agent registry for multi-agent work.

**Tier:** Core

## Modules

| Module | Size | Classes | Functions |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| `lithos.coordination` | XL | 8 | 0 |

## Public API

### `lithos.coordination`
- class `Agent` ‚Äî Agent information.
- class `Task` ‚Äî A coordination task.
- class `TaskEdge` ‚Äî A typed relation between two tasks in the task graph.
- class `Claim` ‚Äî A task aspect claim.
- class `Finding` ‚Äî A task finding.
- class `TaskStatus` ‚Äî Task status with claims.
- class `AccessLogEntry` ‚Äî A single read-access audit log entry.
- class `CoordinationService` ‚Äî SQLite-based coordination service.

## Dependencies

- Depends on: [Config](Config.md), [Errors](Errors.md), [Knowledge](Knowledge.md), [Telemetry](Telemetry.md)
- Used by: [CognitiveMemory](CognitiveMemory.md), [Entrypoints](Entrypoints.md), [Intake](Intake.md), [LCMA](LCMA.md)

## Data stores

- `coordination_db` ‚Äî coordination.db ‚Äî tasks, claims, findings, agents (SQLite)
